body.title: Incrementally Deployable Extensible Delegation for DNS
Problem Statement and Requirements for an Improved DNS Delegation Mechanism abbrev: DNS DELEG Requirements
Initial requirements for a delegation proposal: aliasing
Initial requirements for a delegation proposal: transports
